user.title: Connect to Polyconnect
user.description:
Enter the URL of the Polyconnect bridge server.

**Recommended:** Install the **Polyconnect Bridge** add-on from this repository, then use its ingress URL (auto-detected below).

Make sure you have run the **credential capture** from the add-on's UI before completing setup.

data_description.bridge_url: URL of the Polyconnect bridge (auto-detected if add-on is running)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the heat pump for status updates

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the bridge server. Make sure the Polyconnect Bridge add-on is running and the URL is correct.
error.credentials_missing: The bridge is running but credentials have not been captured yet. Open the Polyconnect Bridge add-on UI and run the capture wizard first.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Polyconnect bridge is already configured.

auth_expired.title: Polyconnect token expired
auth_expired.description:
The session token for your Polyconnect heat pump has expired. Open the **Polyconnect Bridge** add-on and click **Start Capture** to get a new token.

After recapturing, the integration will reconnect automatically.

credentials_missing.title: Polyconnect credentials not configured
credentials_missing.description: The Polyconnect Bridge add-on is running but no credentials have been captured yet. Open the add-on UI and follow the capture wizard to set up your heat pump connection.
